The ratchet proof returns 26; the executable lowerer proof returns 34 through parsed BML method dispatch; adjacent concrete/source/carrier/runtime/picture proofs remain 31, 41, 42, 68, 524488, and 112251. Two runtime validations initially failed when run without source-compiler.fk and grammars/bml.fk; rerunning with the full BML prelude passed.
